visibleItems.title: Start with the work, not the tool
visibleItems.title_html: Start with the work, not the tool
visibleItems.excerpt: Durable A.I. adoption begins with workflows, decisions, and pain points before selecting platforms.
visibleItems.excerpt_html: Durable A.I. adoption begins with workflows, decisions, and pain points before selecting platforms.

visibleItems.title: Modernization Does Not Always Mean Replacement
visibleItems.title_html: Modernization Does Not Always Mean Replacement
visibleItems.excerpt: The first question in a modernization effort should not be what to replace. It should be what the current system knows, what it still does well, and where the friction actually lives.
visibleItems.excerpt_html: The first question in a modernization effort should not be what to replace. It should be what the current system knows, what it still does well, and where the friction actually lives.

visibleItems.title: The smallest useful transformation plan
visibleItems.excerpt: A simple planning pattern for moving from vague improvement goals to manageable technology-enabled changes.
